gameTitle: Batman: The Brave and The Bold - The Videogame

achievements.description: Complete Space Lab.

achievements.title: Cowl and Cape Fear!
achievements.description: Complete Fear Dream.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Knightfall? Not Today!
achievements.description: Complete Gotham without dying.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Unsinkable!
achievements.description: Complete Atlantis without dying.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Mad Science Survivor!
achievements.description: Complete Science Island without dying.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Fog-Free Escape!
achievements.description: Complete London without dying.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Jurassic Survivor!
achievements.description: Complete Dinosaur Island without dying.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Cosmic Courage!
achievements.description: Complete Space Lab without dying.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Master of Fear!
achievements.description: Complete Fear Dream without dying.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Plastic Paratrooper!
achievements.description: Complete the parachute section in Gotham without taking damage and collect 4 large bat coins.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Deep Dive Daredevil!
achievements.description: Complete the diving section in Atlantis without taking damage and collect 3 large bat coins.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Elevator of Doom!
achievements.description: Complete the elevator section in Science Island without taking damage from mines and collect 3 large bat coins.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Crush-Proof!
achievements.description: Complete the moving bone wall section in London without getting crushed or dying.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Jurassic Pursuit!
achievements.description: Complete the T-Rex Chase section in Dinosaur Island without taking damage and collect 5 large bat coins.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Efficient Architect!
achievements.description: Complete the sliding block section in the Space Lab creating 4 or less blocks.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Bat Bomb Blitz!
achievements.description: Complete the Bomb Run section in Fear Dream without taking damage.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Elastic Escapade!
achievements.description: Complete Gotham playing primarily as Plastic Man, starts after teaming up and resets if Batman for 20s consecutively.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Tide Turning Tale!
achievements.description: Complete Atlantis playing primarily as Aquaman, starts after teaming up and resets if Batman for 20s consecutively.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Bug Blaster!
achievements.description: Complete Science Island playing primarily as Blue Beetle, starts after teaming up and resets if Batman for 20s consecutively.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Quiver Full of Justice!
achievements.description: Complete London playing primarily as Green Arrow, starts after teaming up and resets if Batman for 20s consecutively.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Gale-Force Guardian!
achievements.description: Complete Dinosaur Island playing primarily as Red Tornado, starts after teaming up and resets if Batman for 20s consecutively.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Cosmic Crusader!
achievements.description: Complete Space Lab playing primarily as Hal Jordan, starts after teaming up and resets if Batman for 20s consecutively.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Shadow of the Bat!
achievements.description: Complete Gotham playing primarily as Dark Suit Batman using only Batarangs, starts when equipping Batarangs on the first screen and resets if Plastic Man for 20s consecutively. Enter 3756448 in Batcomputer to unlock Dark Batsuit.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Primed for Justice!
achievements.description: Complete Atlantis playing primarily as Dark Suit Batman using only the Bat Grenade, starts when equipping Bat Grenade on the second screen and resets if Aquaman for 20s consecutively. Enter 3756448 in Batcomputer to unlock Dark Batsuit.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Flash of Inspiration!
achievements.description: Complete Science Island playing primarily as Rainbow Suit Batman using only the Flashbang, starts when equipping Flashbang on the second screen and resets if Blue Beetle for 20s consecutively. Enter 7629863 in Batcomputer to unlock Rainbow Batsuit.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Sword of the Dark Knight!
achievements.description: Complete London playing primarily as Medieval Suit Batman using only the Belt Sword, starts when equipping Belt Sword on the first screen and resets if Green Arrow for 20s consecutively. Enter 5644863 in Batcomputer to unlock Medieval Batsuit.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: From Camelot to Cretaceous!
achievements.description: Complete Dinosaur Island playing primarily as Medieval Suit Batman using only Smoke Pellets, starts when equipping Smoke Pellets on the first screen and resets if Red Tornado for 20s consecutively. Enter 5644863 in Batcomputer to unlock Medieval Batsuit.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: The Brightest Day and the Blackest Knight!
achievements.description: Complete Space Lab playing primarily as Rainbow Suit Batman using only the Barrier, starts when equipping Barrier on the first screen and resets if Hal Jordan for 20s consecutively. Enter 7629863 in Batcomputer to unlock Rainbow Batsuit.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Gotham's Secrets!
achievements.description: Collect all the Holograms in Gotham.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Atlantis' Ancient Archives!
achievements.description: Collect all the Holograms in Atlantis.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Scientific Discovery!
achievements.description: Collect all the Holograms in Science Island.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: London's Lost Legends!
achievements.description: Collect all the Holograms in London.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Fossil Finder!
achievements.description: Collect all the Holograms in Dinosaur Island.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Cosmic Collector!
achievements.description: Collect all the Holograms in Space Lab.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Fistful of Justice!
achievements.description: Complete all of the Battle Challenges.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Boss of the Bosses!
achievements.description: Complete all of the Boss Rush Challenges.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Justice Served!
achievements.description: Complete all of the Hero Challenges.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Codebreaker Crusader!
achievements.description: Complete all of the Secret Code challenges. Enter 4846348, 7262348, and 6677686 into the Batcomputer to unlock all five.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Last Laugh!
achievements.description: Defeat Joker in Cape Carmine without being knocked back or down.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Babyface Breaker!
achievements.description: Defeat Babyface in the Boss Rush challenge without taking damage.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Purr-fect Precision!
achievements.description: Defeat Catwoman in the Boss Rush challenge without taking damage.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Bane's Bane!
achievements.description: Defeat Bane the first time in the Boss Rush challenge without taking damage.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Bane and Bane Again!
achievements.description: Defeat Bane a second time in the Boss Rush challenge without taking damage.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.description: Defeat Gentleman Ghost in the Boss Rush challenge without taking damage.

achievements.description: Defeat Sentry Bot in the Boss Rush challenge without taking damage.

achievements.description: Defeat Polaris in the Boss Rush challenge without taking damage.

achievements.description: Defeat Morgan Le Fey in the Boss Rush challenge without taking damage.

achievements.description: Defeat Clock King in the Boss Rush challenge without taking damage.

achievements.title: Corporate Takedown!
achievements.description: Defeat Jarvis Kord in the Boss Rush challenge without taking damage.

achievements.description: Defeat Black Mantra in the Boss Rush challenge without taking damage.

achievements.description: Defeat Scream Queen in the Boss Rush challenge without taking damage.

achievements.title: Batteries Not Included!
achievements.description: Fully unlock and purchase all of the upgrades.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Complete Crusader!
achievements.description: Complete every episode, every challenge, fully upgrade, and collect all holograms. Includes all Secret Code challenges.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Stretchin' into Action!
achievements.description: Perform a Super Team-up move with Plastic Man.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Outrageous!
achievements.description: Perform a Super Team-up move with Aquaman.
achievements.author: Etron

achievements.title: Scarab, Give me Firepower!
achievements.description: Perform a Super Team-up move with Blue Beetle.

achievements.description: Perform a Super Team-up move with Green Arrow.

achievements.description: Perform a Super Team-up move with Hal Jordan.

achievements.title: Gotham's Miteiest Hero!
achievements.description: Activate Bat-mite Boost mode during a Mission. Warning! Bat-mite Boost mode will cancel active challenges and block other achievements in the set.
achievements.author: Etron
